title: tricalysia coriacea subsp. angustifolia
intro: Tricalysia coriacea subsp. angustifolia is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the Rubiaceae family's Tricalysia species. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Tricalysia coriacea subsp. angustifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
